title: IHBT Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 02 Senior PAT Posts
description: Institute of Himalayan Bioresource Technology (IHBT) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 02 vacancies for Senior PAT Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc, M.Pharm, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the IHBT Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
